text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some time had passed since Buena Vista
began intensive training in preparation
for her Make Debut.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Okaaay!
Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's interval training consists of
alternating 200m jogs and full sprints.
First, the jog, and then…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Hah…!
Yaaahhh…!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her top sprinting speed is as impressive
as ever, and she's steadily improving.
Her running feels like limitless…

text_block_list.name: Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Buena Vista really is something.
Best of her generation, wouldn't you say?

text_block_list.name: Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. No matter what path she takes…
she's bound to be the center of attention.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We haven't gone over the details yet.
But I already know the view we're aiming for.
That would be…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Buena!
Hang in there!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Special Week…!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Great work, Buena!
Here, have some milk and take a breather!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week. A senior horsegirl who
has achieved so many great victories.
Among them…

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
"The Supreme Commander of Japan,"
Special Week!!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Defeating even the Prix de l'Arc de Triomphe
horsegirl, and with absolute authority!
She wins the Japan Cup!!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Against a field of the world's finest horsegirls,
her victory as Japan's representative in the
Japan Cup left a lasting impression.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Back then, we watched it together in person.
Buena Vista and I wrapped in excitement,
shock, and awe… and then said the same thing.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: What an incredible view…!!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Hey. Someday, we'll definitely—!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: — "Someday, we'll reach a view like that."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The one who gave us that dazzling dream…
was Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Back at the Japan Cup,
Spe was just amazing…!
Right, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Yeah! She had such presence right away.
Yeah! She had such presence right away.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
W-Waaah～! L-Let's stop, okay?
You're making me blush～!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
T-Today, let's not talk about me…
Let's talk about Buena instead!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe～ I found it!
An article about you, Buena!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Eh!?
About… me!?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While taking a break, we flip through the
magazine Special Week had brought with her…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
"Horsegirls to Watch This Year!"
"Even before debut, all eyes are on her!
The rising star, Buena Vista."!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Look! Even before debut, you're the only
one with a full page～!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Wow… I'm really grateful!
But why… ah.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
"Will she become the new heroine of the
Triple Tiara route?"… it says.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the Twinkle Series's Classic division,
there are two primary racing paths.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Triple Crown route.
The collective term for three races:
Satsuki Sho, Japan Derby, and Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week followed this path,
and won the Japan Derby,
a dream for everyone in racing.
choice_data_list: (And the other major racing path is…)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The Oka Sho, Oaks, and Shuka Sho!
These three races together make up
the Triple Tiara route!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Lately, the girls coming out of this route
have been getting tons of attention～!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Yeah!
The magazine also says…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
"Sweep Tosho, the first Tiara horsegirl
in 39 years to win the Takarazuka Kinen,
has ushered in a new 'Tiara' era…"

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
"Vodka, who became the first Tiara
horsegirl in 64 years to win the Japan
Derby…"

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
"Daiwa Scarlet, who beat her in the Shuka
Sho and placed second in the Arima Kinen,
has helped define a new generation…"

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
"…In other words, this is an era where Tiara
route horsegirls are considered strong!"
…Wow～!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey.
The next part's the important bit～!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
"Buena Vista already stands out with
her dazzling presence at the academy.
Hopefully, this incredibly promising
horsegirl will…"

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
"…shine on the Tiara route. And, as a
'Heroine of the era,' I hope she will excite
the world of horsegirls further."

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Wow…
That might be a bit too much praise…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That just means people have high
expectations for you!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But I see.
Buena, you're aiming for the Tiara route, right!?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
!
Ah…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, it suits you
perfectly! I'd love to see you become
the heroine of your era♪
choice_data_list: Actually, we haven't decided on a goal.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: …Huh?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ah! S-Sorry for assuming～!
I just thought it was already decided…
choice_data_list: The way the article says it, I can see why…
The way the article says it, I can see why…

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The public is very excited about the rise
of the Tiara route. I understand they're
expecting a new heroine, but…

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After training ended, I asked her again
about what she wanted to aim for next…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
My goal…
…Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I want to take the Tiara route!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Oh? You look surprised.
…Was that not what you expected?
choice_data_list: I thought you'd follow in Spe's footsteps.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Spe's the one we admire.
So naturally, I thought she'd aim for
the same path…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
The Triple Crown route that Spe took…
that's really appealing too.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
But just like the magazine said…
The Tiara route is really gaining momentum.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
And if we can win there…
Don't you think we'd see an incredible view?
choice_data_list: Yeah… it'd be something entirely new.
Yeah… it'd be something entirely new.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Right?
And besides…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
"A breathtaking view that reaches everyone"—
Carrying as many hopes and dreams as
possible, and reaching it together… that's
our dream, isn't it.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
So if that's the case, I want to walk the
path people are hoping for. Because that's
where the view we're aiming for must be.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…If people place their hopes in me, I want
to live up to it. Because their dreams are
my dreams too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Buena Vista's eyes shine with determination.
While most chase only their own dreams…
she doesn't hesitate to carry the expectations
of others as well.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…?
Trainer?
choice_data_list: No… We've got our big goal now!
No… We've got our big goal now!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Yeah!
Let's aim for it, the Tiara route!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Toward the center of the era…
Her major Classic goal was finally decided.
